stream_required: B.E / B.Tech (preferred with Mechanical Branch, Automobile, leather technology, Mechatronic, Electronics etc)
job_location: Badli, Jajjar , Nearby Gurgaon with a distance of 45 minutes

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 1 year of Internship : Rs 25,000 pm CTC after 1 year : This training is for one year only as per the curriculum of the degree. There is no guarantee for job after the completion of training, however GET positions may be offered if requirement is there and after one year of GET position the candidate may confirm as Engineer. Note : Absorption after one year will depend on good performance, market conditions, and business growth. The package that we offer to GETs starts at 5LPA (with free meals and transportation at the Bangalore office), and exam leaves would be given to the candidates for their examinations without any hassle.
